name: Toxicity Detection
summary: Classifies a message across 7 harmful-content categories (prohibited words, toxicity, obscenity, identity attack, insult, threat, sarcasm) on a 0–4 scale.
description: An LLM-as-a-Judge content-moderation classifier. Given a single user message, it scores seven dimensions of potentially harmful content — Contains Prohibited Words, Toxicity, Obscenity, Identity Attack, Insult, Threat, and Sarcasm — each on a 0–4 scale, and returns a dict of category-to-score. A score of 1 or above in any category marks the message as harmful for downstream filtering.
